response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, architectural design with UML, and German language proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this role; his Stripe/Shopify experience is impressive but not aligned with the required focus on open-source digital sovereignty and client advisory.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact in GIS and tooling
Proven leadership across startups and tech giants with full-stack expertise
Strong DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience with Docker, GitLab, and Kubernetes
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — falls far short of required C1
No demonstrated experience in UML, requirements management, or IT compliance frameworks
Lacks clear track record in IT consulting or client-facing architecture advisory
